note: Cross-repo canonical pricing snapshot (auditoria 2026-07 F2-05/F7-01). App lib/maxwell/pricing.ts and Web lib/maxwell/proposal-rules.ts must both match this file — enforced by a pricing-parity test in EACH repo. To change pricing: update this file in BOTH repos (byte-identical) plus each repo's local table, in the same cross-repo change. A green parity test with a stale twin is the failure mode this file exists to make visible: diff the twins when in doubt.
